Given the user has signed in, when they reach the Billing address step, then the page collects shipping and billing details (name, address, city, province, country etc.) similar to the registration form.
Given the user is on the cart step, when they change the quantity or remove an item, then the cart totals update accordingly.
Given the user is viewing a product, when they click Add to favourites, then that product is saved to their favourites or wish-list (available once signed in).
Given the user completes the billing step, then the Payment step asks for payment information and confirms the order.
